violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Owner/Employees in process of re-certifying. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

Meat, and cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door stand up in the dining room. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2025

The ceiling above the stove is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floor by the mechanical dishwasher is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023

Food contact surfaces of the potato chopper was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Bottle of sanitizer was observed empty at the time of the inspection. Bottle of chlorine sanitizer was changed.. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023

Ambient temperature of the low boy unit was observed held at 59 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Unit was using to stored NON-TCS food items. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2023
low boy Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023

The floor in the dishwasher area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. - Some ceiling- tiles at the preparation area were observed in poor repair must need to be replace. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
